hooks.command: MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|html|scss|js)$'); [ -z "$MODIFIED" ] && exit 0; LINT_OUT=$(yarn nx affected -t lint --fix 2>&1); LINT_EXIT=$?; [ $LINT_EXIT -eq 0 ] && exit 0; jq -n --arg msg "Lint errors that could not be auto-fixed. Please address before finishing:\n$LINT_OUT" '{"continue": false, "stopReason": $msg}'
